_comment: NPC: Sun Dazhu (孙大柱). Canon ID: N85. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Sun Dazhu
note: Early bullying antagonist at Heng Yue

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Out of my way, junior. This training dummy is mine. Find your own.
You look weak. What realm are you? Qi Condensation? Pathetic. Don't waste my time.
If you want to survive in this sect, learn to stay out of the way of your seniors. Now move.
